name: Cuautla

palette.name: Heroic Brick
palette.rationale: A brick-red editorial tone references Cuautla's independence-era memory and historic-center masonry.

palette.name: Morelos Garden Green
palette.rationale: Warm-climate planting and irrigated gardens provide the clearest everyday color layer.

palette.name: Sunlit Stucco
palette.rationale: A light stucco neutral supports colonial walls, plazas, and bright Morelos daylight.

sources.title: Cuautla Oficial
sources.note: Used for official municipal identity and civic context.

sources.title: Cuautla
sources.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Antropología e Historia
sources.note: Used for independence-history and tourism context.

notes: Minimal starter record intended for later sourcing review; no official city colors are claimed.
editorialSummary: Cuautla's minimal palette gives designers a cautious starting point: historic brick, garden green, and sunlit stucco, all treated as editorial until stronger local sources are added.
